creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
clsung      2007-09-17 01:37:28 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/nusoap           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  NuSOAP is a rewrite of SOAPx4, provided by NuSphere and Dietrich
  Ayala. It is a set of PHP classes - no PHP extensions required - that
  allow developers to create and consume web services based on SOAP 1.1,
  WSDL 1.1 and HTTP 1.0/1.1.
  
  WWW:    http://sourceforge.net/projects/nusoap/
  
  PR:             ports/116174
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin at gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1918    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/net/nusoap/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/nusoap/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/net/nusoap/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +40 -0     ports/net/nusoap/pkg-plist (new)
